notes: Shared cross-stack golden vectors for the modulo-8 AX.25 frame codec. `wire` is the KISS-delivered frame body (no HDLC flags, no FCS) as hex; whitespace/underscores in the hex are ignored. Each vector is decoded, its fields are asserted, then re-encoded and asserted byte-identical to `wire` (round-trip). The first vector transcribes the EXACT bytes C# asserts, so a green run proves the pico-node codec is byte-identical to Packet.Ax25 on real wire.

vectors.name: golden_ui_aprs_command_no_digi
vectors.description: C# anchor: Ax25Frame.Ui(dest APRS-0 command, source G7XYZ-7, info "hello", pid 0xF0). Byte-for-byte identical to C#'s GoldenUi_AprsCommand_NoDigi.

vectors.name: ui_command_two_digipeaters
vectors.description: UI command with a two-hop digipeater path (WIDE1-1, WIDE2-2) and a 3-byte info field; exercises the address-field extension-bit termination across repeater slots.

vectors.name: ui_response_poll_final_empty_info
vectors.description: UI response (dest C=0, source C=1) with the P/F bit set (control 0x13) and an empty info field; exercises the command/response C-bit split and a PID-present, info-absent UI frame.
